description: Instruction by Avraham Maimonides (ha-Nagid, l. 4v) to a scribe to make out a declaration that the court of Fustat had acceded to a ban pronounced against Evyatar al-Kohen al-Amidi in another country. Avraham Maimonides' years of service with the title "Nagid" support an inferred date range estimate of 1213–1237 CE (he bore the title Rayyis al-Yahūd from 1205–1237 CE).
description_he: הוראת אברהם מיימוניד (הנגיד) לסופר לנסח הצהרה שבית דין פוסטאט הצטרף לחרם שהוטל על אביתר אל-כהן אל-אמידי בחו"ל. כ-1213–1237.
